  "complexity_notes": "Moderately-to-high complexity generic React component. Heavy use of TypeScript generics for type-safe columns/data. Notable patterns: abortable async fetch with AbortController in useEffect and an 'ok' flag to prevent state updates after unmount (though it uses comma-operator/short-circuit idioms like 'ok || (setData(...), ...)' which reduce readability). Accessibility is well-considered (ARIA grid roles, aria-sort, aria-current, keyboard sort handlers, screen-reader labels). Pagination window computation uses a sliding 5-button range. Selection managed via memoized context. Dense one-line style favoring brevity over readability; comparator and effect logic warrant careful review. The 'ok' abort flag pattern is somewhat unconventional—it guards against stale updates but the try/catch/finally combined with the flag could be error-prone."
